comment: VibeID persona matrix. Loaded by the vibeid skill via local Read (preferred) or remote WebFetch (fallback). `image_base_url` is relative to the report.html location (~/.claude/usage-data/), so PNGs are resolved from the skill's images/ directory without CDN dependency. Each persona carries both English and Chinese (zh) localized fields; the skill picks based on the user's dominant language.

PFVL.name: Sparkblade
PFVL.tagline: Strikes down bugs in a single flash of steel, roaming as a bounty hunter.
PFVL.tagline_cn: 电光石火一刀劈碎 bug，独来独往的赏金猎人。

PFVH.name: Spark Armada
PFVH.tagline: Leads parallel strikes; ships releases like thunderstorms sweeping the grid.
PFVH.tagline_cn: 多线并行突袭，发版像雷暴扫过电网。

PFAL.name: Solo Forger
PFAL.tagline: One hammer, one anvil, one hand-crafted feature at a time.
PFAL.tagline_cn: 一锤一凿，一次一件地打磨新功能。

PFAH.name: Forge Commune
PFAH.tagline: Leads a tight workshop; new parts roll off the line in fast bursts.
PFAH.tagline_cn: 带着匠人小队，新件像流水线一样飞速出炉。

PSVL.name: Lone Scout
PSVL.tagline: Magnifier in hand, investigates the codebase alone and finds the truth.
PSVL.tagline_cn: 放大镜加地图，独自摸清代码库底细。

PSVH.name: Swarm Scout
PSVH.tagline: Fans out multiple scouts; sweeps many fronts at once.
PSVH.tagline_cn: 分身撒出斥候，同时扫描多条战线。

PSAL.name: Lone Cartograph
PSAL.tagline: Draws the map of the codebase in solitude, on weathered parchment.
PSAL.tagline_cn: 独自在孤岛绘制代码地图。

PSAH.name: Star Atlas
PSAH.tagline: Collaborative sky-mapper; teaches apprentices to chart the constellations.
PSAH.tagline_cn: 带学徒协作绘制宏大星图。

TFVL.name: Deep Captain
TFVL.tagline: Takes the helm alone on long night voyages; one ship, one release at a time.
TFVL.tagline_cn: 夜航独驾，一船压上一次 release。

TFVH.name: Star Admiral
TFVH.tagline: Commands multiple deep-space fleets on coordinated release campaigns.
TFVH.tagline_cn: 指挥多支深空舰队同步出击。

TFAL.name: Nightsmith
TFAL.tagline: Forges in silence under the moon; deep work, solo craft.
TFAL.tagline_cn: 月下炉火旁默默锻造，沉浸式独作。

TFAH.name: Titan Builder
TFAH.tagline: Leads an engineering crew to raise massive, durable structures.
TFAH.tagline_cn: 带工程队修筑巨型建筑，稳健耐久。

TSVL.name: Deep Sage
TSVL.tagline: Contemplates the essence of code in lotus position; wisdom alone.
TSVL.tagline_cn: 盘坐冥想代码本质，独守智慧。

TSVH.name: Starborne Scholar
TSVH.tagline: Teaches a circle of apprentices; collective wisdom under the stars.
TSVH.tagline_cn: 带一众学徒在星空下共修学问。

TSAL.name: Lone Architect
TSAL.tagline: Alone on the cliff-studio, draws blueprints for monumental systems.
TSAL.tagline_cn: 悬崖工作室独自绘制宏大系统蓝图。

TSAH.name: Star Architect
TSAH.tagline: Leads design councils on holographic blueprints spanning cosmic scale.
TSAH.tagline_cn: 主持宇宙级全息蓝图的设计评审。
